name: osboa
description: one song a week. for a year. cybernetically.

posts.title: (52) KEEF
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
until the end - beast of burden
(first heard on some girls)

remember what day it was 
when it all ended for us?
it feels unfinished for the second time; 
a life unfulfilled 

a mule wouldn’t carry our load 
old and new and i’m hurting


(i know it is true it is imprinted in our genes 
i know it is true in snowflakes)

our shadows weaving, 
sharing the weight
feel my weight - move closer 
we planned for it a travesty of life
without a chance to bail out, 
replay, 
feel my weight 

move closer 
nothing seems to work

 squeak, lower, slowdown
we are still us appallingly apart,


squeak, lower, slowdown
as dust 
till death do us apart



remember what day it was when it all ended for us?

it feels unfinished for the second time; 
a life unfulfilled 


remember what day it was when it all ended for us?

posts.title: (51) REID
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
roxanne roxanne - sidewalking 
(first heard on barbed wire kisses)





It's been days since I slept the whole night dream free


It's been days since I slept the whole night

Yes i confess: 
we walked just like lonely souls in portraits 
looking backwards when we were JUST kids
when we were kids

Today all this nostalgia makes me sick
My harbinger thinks I am special 
night after night day after day 

Instead i drive north (i don't like the way this goes, north goes together with drive, not mary, it is sounding you drive and a person called North-Mary is riding shotgun, is it possible to have the pause after north instead of after drive?)
Mary riding shotgun looking for whores in Inverness 
Over there they call it kerb (THIS MUST SOUND CURB NOT KERB) crawling 
kerb crawling even when the sidewalk is covered in frost

posts.title: (50) GEORGE IVAN
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
the task force - he ain’t give you none 
(first heard on a collections cd on the discounted bin)


how dare you stargaze indoors we are all stars by trade by birth
i saw monsters preying on us i saw monsters in uniform
AND I I CAN'T BREATH NO SIR I CAN'T BREATH
we should be so free by now instead we choke  by the boardwalk on chokehold
we are all hostages not protected not served you can see "them" everyday
AND I I CAN'T BREATH NO SIR I CAN'T BREATH
in memorian Eric Garner

posts.title: (49) MICHAEL
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
i will be a new king - hallogallo 
(first heard on neu!)


It was pastiche and collage 
But we built a world 
And it forked twice 
While we were looking the other way  
Or maybe, maybe not looking 
In the right direction at all 

 I almost hit delete by choice 
Would you remember it as I do? 
The demons The clockwork?
Would you remember?

 The jet thrust punishing us 
Like we were fish on mud 
Getting legs to survive 
They grew fast 
As a result 
We have knee surgery 
And prefer (you are singing "prepare" instead of "prefer") aisle seats 

 I almost hit delete by mistake 
Would you remember it as I do? 
The demons The clockwork?
Would you remember?

 (the verses below are important, you didn't want to sing them?
 should be the same scene as "the jet thrust punishing us...")
We did it as a system 
As a leaning tool, before Lebanon 
Before we had to reboot  
Login as root and change everything 
From inside out

posts.title: (48) DA LUZ
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
the mill - heartbreaker 
(first heard on godforsaken)


the red mill has changed 
as i may have changed 
it no longer dwarfs me 
it no longer impresses me

 these days i see it everyday from the bridge  
it seems so alone  
the blades removed 
ahead of the gusting winds 

i don't blame it anymore for not finding  
what I thought was mine
step over here joker 
it is midnight let us roll the dice  
together this time 

 my heart has healed you see  
you can't break it again 
i can no longer be broken 
i am invincible at last

posts.title: (47) ROGER
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
crossfade - let there be more light 
(first heard on a saucerful of secrets)



i left as predicted 
i left it was understood 
i left and inevitable (this word is not sound natural, not enough room - try IT WAS instead of "and" and EVIDENT instead of "inevitable")
as best solutions always are

i started gardening vegetables (this word is not sound natural, not enough room - try VEGGIES)
at first then apples then made a career on oranges

 this could could be better (??? i cant find this on the original lyrics, you either put it there or we discussed and agreed, but i can't exactly figured what neumann is singing)

i felt as predicted and favored 
my pulse raced towards dark
i ended up fairy-taling 

 l never could guess my friends
would abandon me 
just like that 


i ended up fairy-taling 

 filtering the sun with a sieve 
made with my old socks
i am here as predicted 
filtering the sun as predicted
i am here as predicted
i am here

 it was inelegant to pronounce my death so soon
it was inelegant to pronounce my death so soon
i felt as predicted and favored 
my pulse raced towards dark

i ended up fairy-taling 

 l never could guess my friends
would abandon me 
just like that 

i ended up fairy-taling 

 it was inelegant to pronounce my death so soon

it was inelegant to pronounce my death so soon
it was inelegant to pronounce my death so soon

posts.title: (46) KING
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
wlawda - we live as we dream alone 
(first heard on hard)




the great american chef abandoned ship before it sank
and while SHE did IT 
at the cabaret the teenage singer 
tapping a beat on an armchair 
chanted slogans
we kept in time by counting falling leaves 

 everyone WAS suspicious SCARED 

 the ghost of nikita escaped the gulag 
got lost in the tundra died again 
and was reborn as permafrost
DIED AGAIN AND DIED AGAIN 

he had only a single shot and fired to the head

the aftermath became exciting times for dictators like us

and this is what we dictated

 the ghost of nikita escaped the gulag 
got lost in the tundra died again 
and was reborn as permafrost

posts.title: (45) BRYAN
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
cincinnatti - bloodbuzz ohio 
(first heard on high violet)


till today we continue to work day jobs 
tomorrow we are free it is sunday night 
tomorrow we are free
tomorrow we will show up at the luna lounge and 
watch the stars and sing to the starman

 outside there is a manhunt for a shooter 
outside there is a wedding and it is chilled
outside there is a hill to climb and we are drunk 
outside the herald just came out wearing it 
outside

 my alter ego sells chemicals for a living 
your other self sells tickets to time travel
my alter ego sells insurance for a living 
your other self sells tickets to cincinnatti (not cincinetti please :P)

 outside there is a manhunt for a shooter 

outside there is a wedding and it is chilled
outside there is a manhunt for a shooter 


outside there is a wedding and it is chilled

 my alter ego sells chemicals for a living 
your other self sells tickets to time travel

my alter ego sells chemicals for a living 
your other self sells tickets to time travel

 still today we continue to work day jobs

still today we continue to work

posts.title: (44) THOM
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
i withstand - you and whose army 
(first heard on amnesiac)


the culprit slept on the tracks of an abandoned railway 
(the trains stopped running long ago)
before the soldiers came riding on ghost horses 
(they came last night)

 the air is thick so thick that i can slice a bit of it 
with an army knife

we keep getting it all wrong 

 our dreams WERE obsolete
before inertia killed us
our dreams WERE obsolete
before weed (está soando com WE) took over the central park 
the hyde park

 the air is thick so thick that i can slice a bit of it 

with an army knife

 time crawls like it is immerse in goo (a pronuncia esta errada tem que ser GÚ está soando como GOLD)
there was no merit in modern life 

 our parking lots our prime real estate our premium outlets
we keep getting it all wrong

posts.title: (43) LIZZY
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
benson 34500d - money, power and glory 
(first heard on ultra violence)


It happened Only once By happenstance In a glorious future Where we never met In a city ruined As far as the end of the road to dope 
And then farther We grieve We hunger For power 
For diamonds We couldn't stay still 
Wasting comfort In big master plans 
Executed Without flaw By machinery humming Lullabies 
And then We fell asleep At last Right there By the thing 
That keeps all things Running 
We run from the day The day we would Get rich Get doped And diamonds 
So we didn't 
We never filed For divorce 
We are still one With the beatbox 

We are still one With the beat 
God still wants us to be boys
God still wants dope And diamonds

posts.title: (42) JOSEPH
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
spin - someone in the dark 
(first heard on e.t. soundtrack)





The mistake was to think we had the intention


The mistake was to think we had the intention
The mistake was to think 

We found solitude in loneliness
We were never really alone 
We were never really alone 
We found solitude in loneliness
We were never really 


The mistake was to think we did it  
The mistake was to think we did it intentionally 

They were inevitable 
I was looking amused at things that change 
Nothing ever changed

The mistake was to think we did it on purpose 
That we had planned the trips 
when we simply stumble upon them 
The mistakes...

Someone was Always waiting In the dark 
For things to change 
Everything changes 
A little everyday

It can never be avoided and looking amused won’t make things change 
Nothing ever changes

posts.title: (41) RICHELLE
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
the iraqi who laughed - nearly midnight, honolulu 
(first heard on the worst things get...)


she boarded a jet fighter  in waimea through the back door the systems went go but not the compass she couldn’t zero on north whatever happen to the magnetic fields of earth?
the apple of my eye fell upwards oh by the way could you just get the fuck away from me?
she boarded the shuttle bus in waimea without a ticket in rags and a trench coat he didn’t know where she was heading - south with her own bottled water as precaution
the apple of my eye fell upwards oh by the way could you just get the fuck away from me?

posts.title: (40) GRANTZBERG
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
a whale - shoot your way to freedom 
(first heard on nova mob)



A slave got freed too late to become happier He knows happy trigger happy happiness is when the phone rings 
It didn't ring It was shot to pieces We know the maths It all adds up to nothing 
A slave found a gun too late got free then got lost He knows lost Lost is when There is nowhere to go When signposts Keep showing where we should have been 
Where we are not We were shot to pieces We know the maths It all adds up to nothing

posts.title: (39) DAVE
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
suckpunches - girlfriend is better 
(first heard on speaking in tongues)





a media darling captured on film on a security camera went viral circled the planet twice in day it's the same old same old lazy afternoons in midtown hunting street art for madame a girlfriend of long ago chose sides the other side traded her maiden name for the billboard she's in a wall with COST it's the same old same old lazy afternoons in mudtown hunting street art for madame there was a rush and the scream of sirens soundtracking our au revoir can you be my boyfriend again? it's the same old same old lazy afternoons in anytown scavenging street art for fame

posts.title: (38) MICHAEL
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
california on my mind, part two  - wish
(first heard on broken)




how dare you passing judgement on her wearing a 2 million diamond loafers at the morning show when there are 70 acres of California burning and running backs of fame disciplining small boys come over here you don't look so tough without your clothes on tell me what you wish for tell me about what you do online in secret how dare you passing judgement on water restrictions when walnut creek is dry and the mirror lake is a sandbox the plastic bag ban will be enforced today come over here tell me what you wish for

posts.title: (37) PASSARO
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
the iroquois - i wanna get a mohawk 
(first heard on answer that and stay fashionable)


upstate where the partridge drums i trade flints for snakes
poison for maple trees and scalps for cholera with the dutch
never saw the end coming galloping on gambling booze and smallpox
till it ended, a death beyond the river, 
and a ghost dancing, drunk, plucked hair
feathers on what’s left, braided
a gamble to the end, in the end we did collide with the void, and lost
the end will repeat itself again for one hundred more years
until we got the answer we were looking for, when will it be enough?

posts.title: (36) BRISTOL BEAVER FUQUA '61
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
harlot - someday we'll be together 
(first heard on cream of the crop)

a lycanthrope howled in self defeat the howl still echoed as i moved north 
it was exhausting 
maybe if i looked from a better angle it would make sense to be here alone 
longing for togetherness 
a harlot’s kiss taste in self deceit still lingered as i moved north 
it was exhausting 
maybe if i looked from a better angle it would make sense to be here alone 
longing for togetherness

posts.title: (35) ALLAN '78
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
bad luck - street hassle
(first heard on street hassle)


a monologue to keep me quiet and avoid trouble at chandler's
a gramophone a broken record used as an instrument of pain
< i am quiet i am hurt i am left to die and it is alright
   i am no longer a subscriber to your services >
a waltz for today's queen the national guard marches on
a parade that will never end before the sun sets behind your house
< i dance i march i have the right to die on national television
    i am no longer a subscriber to your services >

posts.title: (34) MISTER JONES
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
jakarta - i'm afraid of americans
(first heard on earthling)

in the real world huge holes in the pavement are big mouths eating backpackers 
black holes that regurgitate ruminate and dream of outsiders 
     eat me i’m ripe / eat me, i’m ripe 
in the real world climbers ankles swell going down the mouth of bromo 
my numero uno is parked outside i’m parked outside 
from over here it all looks the same there is no diversity this city will eat us and regurgitate 
all life narrows and jumps out of the hole identical
     eat me i’m ripe / eat me, i’m ripe

posts.title: (33) GRAHAM
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
electricity - clash city rockers 
(first heard on the clash)


when jack moves to town on the accelerator / i better leave town  on the escalator
this town is gonna  burn you out  sooner or later / burn the suburbs and pretend to enjoy it
when i am fitter you’ll shut your mouth / when i’m useless you’ll close your eyes
i am employed / i plug the sky and i groove and liquefy

posts.title: (32) PERCIVAL '79
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
the key principles of ruthlessness - pocahontas
first heard on rust never sleeps


they do smile, but not in public where it is agreed to be forbidden
(they do however yawn, to yawn underground is fine)
outside the snow covers the streets of tennsta; it’s white in all directions!
we took the wrong line and ended up lost looking for a cab
they did smile but were somali relocated north to see the aurora borealis
turn the sky green

(it resonated in bleeps when amanda first got troubled)
outside the snow covers the street of tennsta; it’s white in all directions

posts.title: (31) NEWELL '69
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
big bad voodoo doll - little doll 
(first heard on the stooges)


i gave myself entirely, liquified in words unspoken
still it feels like i could have done a lot more for us
a prayer perhaps? yes a prayer may have gotten us going a little longer 
than the stop sign
a voodoo doll? yes a doll would have gotten us somewhere entirely different 
somewhere with happiness and everything
like songs or someone who would make me sing tickled tackled five in a row

posts.title: Stuart 1984
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
a shop on the ground floor - east of eden
(first heard on steeltown)
my new spectacles are polished
I think I can finally look at tomorrow 
with yesterday’s eyes
and what should have happened will happen instead
who knows where all my days went? 

 could see your face on my eyelids 
do you know where all my days went? 

 did we really spend them 
pillaging the kingdom for drugs?
did we really?

 heaven, 
i got the directions wrong
let salvation be 
a spectacular procession towards heaven

i got the directions wrong
let salvation be 
a spectacular procession

landed east at a funeral party 
they blindfolded me
and sent me back to you 

 they let salvation be you
they let salvation be you

posts.title: (29) KYRIACOS
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
a new greece - faith (first heard on faith)


We were here
before the fire when we were two and
posted postcards that arrived too late
we navigated by stars and maps and
we asked for directions to the stars

We were here
before that river became the ocean
before we tried to stage it again
before the quitter had left the building
I am still waiting for all the things
I have learnt from you

We are here
after the flood and
we are five left one behind,
relegated, bills paid,
singalongs and trophy wives

We are here
after the ocean swallow that river
after we tried to give in again
in front of the quitter
laughing at us

posts.title: (28) ALBERT
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
plenty of ghosts - i got plenty of nothing 
(first heard on the capitol years)


the days kept coming and going 
coming and going 
we could not hang on to them 
so we spawned ghosts 
and mixtapes we never listened to 
until now 
now we press the exit button 
and escape our tawdry lives 
the ones we lived like a Fante script 

 i've got plenty of nothing and nothing is plenty for me

the nights kept coming and going 
coming and going 
we could not keep up with them 
so we invented memories and exotic tea 
we never intended to drink 
until now now we press the cancel key 
and escape our tawdry lives 
the ones we lived before we left brazil 

 i've got plenty of nothing and nothing is plenty for me

posts.title: (27) James 83
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
what i need is what you got
first heard as "synchronicity I" on "synchronicity "

(i have written about this before, but not like that)
i don't like big parties anymore, i get bored in parties
i get frustrated in parties
so what? no more feasts? 
no more roads falling on buses?
i get frustrated in parties
something, somewhere will always fall
i read today this year's party has "petered out"
it reminded me of little pete, your invisible friend
and what he could have said 
instead of babbling of missing links

and leaving us, humiliated, kicking crotches
we became exhausted, diminished to nothing

i read today that this year's party has "petered out"
never heard that before
but douglas harper had, it is miners' slang from long back

posts.title: (26) ELEONORA '46
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
watching the sea - i cover the waterfront (first heard on mr lucky but i like this version better)

eighteen fifteen / babe is gone maybe gone / 
i never noticed her / leaving / she is different / she always counts to ten / and bring out the dead
eighteen twenty five / she is overflowing / with emotions / 
pervading her all / seismically / banging like a joke / 
i got it first time / almost by itself / and brought  out the dead
eighteen thirty three / i didn’t really look  / very hard / just everywhere
you never are / bouncing pebbles / as far as the end of the pier / bringing out the dead
eighteen forty two / drunk drunk / everyone (except noah) / 
noah cries on the couch / interrogatingly / almost crying / the knee of noah / 
craves for a hand / to land on it / and bring out the dead

posts.title: (25) MATT '89
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
jesus and darwin - armageddon days are here again (first heard on mind bomb)

 i fished you with beagle propaganda 
you fished me with the book 
we didn't bite 
we went watching planes land 
on the pie in the sky 
from the back porch 
of the crab shack 
in downtown dallas 
/ 
and that was, according to you 
like sunday school 
as the final solution 
/ 
every one should listen to the creek 
at least once 
we didn't last 
we didn't grieve 
/ 
for most people 
walking the illusion 
heaven was now 
time was here 
we missed the creek 
/ 
every one should listen to the creek 
at least once

posts.title: (24) PATRICK '83
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
punctured lungs - this charming man (first heard on hatfull of hollow)

everybody remembers / where they were / the day they heard / i was moving to london / 
she was on stage / playing a heartbroken / dying politician killing love affairs
heartbroken  / she won't have anything  / more to do with me / she fled the city on a bike.
she wanted the inside  / of the story  / holding the key to a perfect life / 
perfectly secret / perfect car / perfect leather pants
she dyes her hair and  / puts on a false mustache  / and becomes  / the snake charmer / of the fun fair / 
the heart doctor / for the heartbroken (i stalk her online  / sometimes / but i never met her again)

posts.title: (23) FREUDER '80
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
tainted tattoo - tunnel of love (first heard on making movies)

i choose waltzers that sing about ghost trains when I am screaming in the light 
she is the victim one army fever and my neon soul burning up above high on the lovegirl 
i chose danger the perfect babe stranger just a babe won't give me soul 
give me two give me two and empty your diesel heart all over me 
i'm all whirling muscle with another girl i hustled to make it big and fade away 
the girl she looks like madrid on a silver screen 
 she said remember my kiss remember me like this

posts.title: (22) KATHLEEN '68
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
maria's chi - Ain't Got No, I Got Life (first heard on nina simone remixed and reimagined)

i ain’t got a voice i ain’t got good hearing i ain’t got a reason i ain’t got faith i ain’t got the right i ain’t got eyesight i ain’t got scissors ain’t got a wrench i ain’t got a mariachi and i ain’t got a choice i ain’t got a signal i ain’t got your blessing 
i am alone and i, i am a forest of very tall trees i am with you and i, i am a forest 
i ain´t got a saint i ain’t got good knees i ain’t got summer i ain’t got snow i ain’t got no show i ain’t got a chance i ain’t got time i ain’t got the check 
i am alone, i am a forest i am with you in tall trees, in tall trees

posts.title: (21) LEE '72
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
hotel chicago - never get out of these blues alive (first heard on a blues compilation bought back in 1997 somewhere in AZ)

i stole dad’s brylcreem / to look older / so i could pass for a pimp / 
and get into the blues house / where the whores work / 
and drink coffee (the best coffee in the world) / 
but whatever’s in my cup / rips my guts from the inside / 
i bleed for an hour / in a dark corner / 
i fear the floor / and i fear the roof 
i am sure no one / has ever left this house / 
but in a body bag a blue body in a black bag

posts.title: (20) SCOTT '74
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
insecurity - skating away on the thin ice of a new day (first heard on bursting out)

there is always war / there is also ice / thin ice on the lake / we will go out / and we will skate 
 it is better than before / it is all we get / it is all we will give / we came from a different yesterday 
there is always rain / there is also soldiers / fighting alone / they have gone out / they have gone out / the circle line
that was better than fight / it is all they had / to give up / to give in 
the place they came from / is different today / very different today

posts.title: (19) CHANDELLE '68
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
ekes nasaste - crimson and clover (first heard on the best of tommy james and the chandelles)

 
(ekes nasaste) 
it nauseates 
i dreamt a namaste girl 
in redgreen
it made my head 
bob 
boil up and down
it’s my namesake 

(tesa naseke)
i will tell her 
over tea 
next time we meet
it is the wheel of fortune 
that’s spinning 
and spinning

i locked all distractions
away from my soul
it went wrong
i lost my direction 
then something went wrong 

and we started 
trading pictures 
of candlestick burns 
over snapchat

posts.title: (18) TAYLOR '67
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
everything - the good humor man (first heard on forever changes)

everything i see is like that 
in the evening 
i get my mugshot taken 
i shoot a hummingbird 
and i plead no contest

i get arrested 
again for sex gone wrong 
and i plead innocent
i get cuffed roughly 
for post-bone smirking 
and i don’t ever do nothing

everything i see is like this 
everything i see is like this 

everything i see is like this 
in the evening 
i get caught with drugs 
that look like pigtails 
and i have zero-cred

everything i see is like this 
in the evening 
i violate probation 
for stalling summer 
hanging over a bridge

posts.title: (17) RUSTYJAMES '83
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
travis working hard - don't box me in  (first heard on rumble fish soundtrack)

i idolized him he left me paralized in a box 
a cat both dead and alive blinking 
i lift the lock i take a peek and fumble 
i mess up the universe collapses 
into what is mine one day 
I'll show you what life made of me 
the world was mine until my brother disappeared in shades of white 
i got lost in anger i can’t stand goldfish since then 
the cat alive because i looked 
the goldfish dead in the cat’s mouth because i looked 
ascending to the top of my street gang one day 
I'll show you what life made of me

posts.title: (16) WILLIAM '72
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
ayahuasca: first heard as "paradise" on "demons and wizards"

we've been trying to discover
conscience, awareness behind bitterness
we've been trying black pills
empowering sorrows from secret hearts
stop confusing me with boredom
everything was not worth it time flies
you were my illusion,
watch the walls closing in
for those who thought we could change
nor did he allow us to prosper
even the smallest bit
there was pleasure and then a peasant
walking hand in hand
plowing the land, it brought me to tears
stop confusing me with boredom
everything was not worth it time flies
we could change we never did really
got mad instead and terrified
imagining paradise as the best we know
stop confusing me with boredom
everything was not worth it time flies
you were my illusion,
watch the walls closing in
for those who thought we could change
i degraded myself

posts.title: (15) JOHN 1984
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
the harpy, fed: first heard as "no explanation" on "remote luxury"

A right hand red-nailed crawling from under the flower bed
Caught unaware on close circuit tv
It is she from across the river singing backwards
Flying a harpy fed with lies and kisses
There’s no explanation
It’s an exaggeration
A pair of feet red-nailed cracking the tarmac
Caught unprepared on close circuit tv
It is me from across the world reading backwards
Feeding a harpy with golden lies
It’s so, an extrapolation
A hairless head red-tailed steaming windows
Caught dreaming on close circuit tv
It is us in another land dreaming backwards
Killing the harpy looking into our eye

posts.title: (14) LAMOUREAUX 1987
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
corazón: first heard as "if looks could kill" on "heart"

you were good very good hiding it
i never knew you would do it to me
if looks could kill they probably will
but look again at the way i look at you now
i never knew i was unable to forget
promise me you will never lie to me again
and i will never look at you again
if looks could kill they probably will
but look again at the way i look at you now
or maybe not because if you do
you will be at least half dead by noon
if looks could kill they probably will
but look again at the way i look at you now

posts.title: (13) BRIAN 1992
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
digging in the dirt: first heard on "us"
"i told i told i told you !"

posts.title: (12) LEE 2004
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
lisa alone at the disco: first heard as "mona lisa" on "virginia creeper"

it is a step in the right direction,
you did indeed smiled once
i heard it from the painter
he got it wrong
framed you as a snob beyond reach
i saw you princess
so small half dead for 20 seconds
shared by half the peasants in Paris
you, disappearing in the sea of heads
in the smell of the mob
i did consider gambling
but no it was a game you've never lost

posts.title: (11) JAMMIN 1985
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
of absence: first heard as "why i love country music" on "easy pieces"

welcome to safety, to everlasting peace,
inside the womb of a wombat it’s dark there,
with eyes wide open you can see the news tick,
tick by the story of our lives,
the market value of our souls,
amused, we consumed it easy
with cheap gas and fresh milk to kitten,
kitten’s dead
i buried him under the cherry tree
in a cardboard box
we saw him through the next life quickly,
a zeitgeist of headlines
from a subway free paper
(underground) we are happy we are denizens of a living city
it is kitten i saw him today
he asked me why i let him die
i remember it (or most of it)
it must have been the cheap wine
and it made no sense
it must have been the cheap wine
they served at the studio that day

posts.title: (10) NESTA 2001 [posthumously]
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
i should've known my place
(first heard as "i know a place" on "i know a place")

The greater good is all we need
And then I hide From all my friends and build a nest
from where i can watch all of them suffer
The greater good is all there is
And then rejoice with deeds not words
i’ll come and take it feel me in your heart
you know it’s right you know it's true
The greater good will never let me down
You can’t hide from the king
one one four fifty four forty
or fight for the revolution
you know better them let it down
The greater good is the greater good

posts.title: (9) NEALE 1969
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
elusive butterfly: first heard on "a collection of 60s songs"
"meadows, shadows and other such hippie non-sense"

posts.title: (8) WINSTON 1967
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
baby you're a rich man: first heard on "magical mystery tour"
"when i am reborn, on the year two million, or not, or whatever"

posts.title: (7) LEKA DeCARLO 1969
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
kiss him goodbye: first heard on "steam"
"Na na na na, na na na na, hey hey, goodbye"

posts.title: (6) FELD 1972
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
national security: first heard as "rabbit fighter" on "the slider"

we the people may act unlawfully
we collected stories, stored in secret
and party in the dark
with the tramp king.
Ni dieu, Ni maitre
only a white rabbit in a cage
hallucinating jojo
i know you know
we the politicians are not content
to the retrieving or storing of our thoughts,
as well as printing, copying, disseminating,
or otherwise using it.
Ni dieu, Ni maitre
only a moondog In a cage
hallucinating kojo
you know i know

posts.title: (5) ENGLISH 1981
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
things i never got the chance to say: first heard as "too nice to talk to" on "wha'ppen?"

a cop delivered, veins and shlep
it deprived us of evil, reseeded, comatose
we demanded punishment
these are the things i was meant to tell you before you left
we screeched “lotus toxins!”
from electrocuted, sloth sluts, their iridescence bouncing
we expect nothing less
these are the things i was meant to tell you before you left
fetching fishnets finely thorn your legs
finally turn, we turned north with a feisty, hairy doll
these are the things i was meant to tell you before you left

posts.title: (4) CAMPBELL 1978
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
get on our own: first heard on "another music in a different kitchen"
"i liked what i saw"

posts.title: (3) ELAINE 1978
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
the swarm: first heard as "meteor man" on "cosmic curves"

once there was a fight we came on top we left the water
darwinianly climbing the steps
we became meteorites, fragments of a star no longer in the sky
AFTER ALL THE FIGHT WE STILL HAVE NO SENSE
OF SELF OR SELF CONTROL
it was an accident to meet the dark suits in a swarm
they were sure we would lose
they never saw what killed us we opened the locks
and let all the pigs gloat
AFTER ALL THE FIGHT WE STILL HAVE NO SENSE
OF SELF OR SELF CONTROL

posts.title: (2) JOHN 1991
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
honey in me
(first heard on as "me in honey" on "green")

honey, the bees are dead we killed them
and they were not ours the bees we rented
from the beekeeper
and we can’t pay back
and at that rate it won't take long
before this is a world without song
it will take a year
a year away spent behind bars
island hopping eating cod-head soup
deliver us back to our mother’s womb
and bring back the honeybees

posts.title: (1) DE LA SALLE 1974
posts.author: eKsKog
posts.content:
the fat lady of limburg: first heard on here comes the warm jets
"that's what we are paid for"
